alias: Walmart Delivery: Safety Timeout (45 min max)
description: Failsafe: If garage is fully open (100%) for more than 45 minutes with Walmart override on, close to 20% vent position. Prevents garage staying open indefinitely if delivery status never updates.

data.title: Garage Safety Timeout
data.message: Garage was open >45 min during Walmart delivery mode. Closed to 20% vent for safety. Override still active.

data.title: 🚨 Garage Safety Timeout
data.message: Garage was open >45 min. Closed to 20% vent.
